other: His S3 gives him additional ammo if he's too low to prevent it from stopping early. It will also automatically {status:MeursaultSporeBulletReloading} at the end.

His S3 deals additional damage with spare atk weight and the last coin does a mini {status:Combustion} burst at max {status:MeursaultBeeSpore}, consuming the {status:MeursaultBeeSpore} stacks in the process. The formula caps out at 148 bonus {keyword:Wrath} damage with 99 {status:Combustion}.
usage: Starts battles with 10 {status:MeursaultSporeBulletLong} and 6 {status:MeursaultSporeBulletShort}. Coins that use {status:MeursaultSporeBulletLong} are single target and inflict 2 {status:MeursaultBeeSpore}, while those that use {status:MeursaultSporeBulletShort} have atk weight and inflict 3 {status:MeursaultBeeSpore}. He can also convert 2 {status:MeursaultSporeBulletLong} to 1 {status:MeursaultSporeBulletShort} at the cost of 2 SP whenever he's out. Running out of bullets mid-skill cancels the skill and automatically consumes SP to trigger a {status:MeursaultSporeBulletReloading}.

Killing enemies with {status:MeursaultBeeSpore} gives him {status:MeursaultWorkerBee}, giving him minor buffs next turn and also buffs his S2 and S3 with clashing and {status:SuperCoin}s. S3 also gets an additional atk weight on its last coin at max {status:MeursaultWorkerBee}. His passive can also give him additional {status:MeursaultBeeSpore} application and refunds some ammo when killing enemies with {status:MeursaultBeeSpore}.

1051401.desc: On Kill against targets with [MeursaultBeeSpore], inflict double the [MeursaultBeeSpore] for the next turn
1051401.name: Spore Diffusion

1051402.desc:
Always Active: Begin Encounters with 10 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong] and 6 [MeursaultSporeBulletShort]

On Hit with Coins that spend Spore Round:
- If [MeursaultSporeBulletLong] was spent, inflict 2 [MeursaultBeeSpore]
- If [MeursaultSporeBulletShort] was spent, inflict 3 [MeursaultBeeSpore]
- This counts as "inflicting negative effects with the Skill"

Before Coin Use of a Coin that spends [MeursaultSporeBulletShort], if this unit does not have [MeursaultSporeBulletShort], consume 2 SP and 2 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong] to gain 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletShort]

If this unit runs out of Spore Round mid-Skill, cancel all subsequent Coins and [MeursaultSporeBulletReloading]

When targets with [MeursaultBeeSpore] are killed, gain 1 [MeursaultWorkerBee]
1051402.name: E.G.O Alteration / Spore Round

1051411.desc:
On Kill against targets with [MeursaultBeeSpore], gain the following effects:
- Inflict double the [MeursaultBeeSpore] for the next turn
- On Kill with a Base Attack Skill, gain (Spore Round the Skill spends / 2) Spore Round (rounded up; once per Skill)
1051411.name: Spore Diffusion

1051421.desc:
Ally Pierce Base Attack Skill End: The said ally heals HP equal to 10% of HP damage dealt with the attack (2 times per Encounter)
- For this turn, if all Base Attack Skills equipped on allied Skill Slots are Pierce Skills, all allies heal 10 SP at Turn End
1051421.name: Worker Bee
